generated_oml:
instance BuildingInfrastructureLivingLab : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingInformationModel, TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingActuator
]

instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional building component data, enriched with sensor and actuator metadata for Building Control Systems (BCS), and middleware configuration for Eclipse Hono and Ditto; validated and transformed via automated model-to-model and model-to-text transformations for runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToolsEnabler
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control Systems (BCS) collecting real-time temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control Systems (BCS) collecting real-time occupancy data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from BCS sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from BCS sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance BIMToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling building components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating predictive analytics on building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing building energy usage through automated control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for adjusting visual comfort parameters in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAction
]

instance HealthEffectManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing non-visual health effects through building control"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing building energy consumption based on predictive analytics"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for adjusting visual comfort parameters to enhance occupant well-being"
]

instance HealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for managing non-visual health effects through building control"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC settings for energy savings"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting and shading for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HealthEffectAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments for air quality and thermal comfort to manage health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling HVAC systems based on digital twin commands"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling lighting systems based on digital twin commands"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insights for building monitoring"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for scenario evaluation"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insights for building operations"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin (e.g., for HVAC or lighting) sent through Eclipse Hono and Ditto to actuators and controllers in the physical Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization of physical asset data with the digital twin for continuous monitoring and control, with data exchange occurring at the frequency of sensor updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture where components (sensors, actuators, services) are integrated via standardized extension points, with Eclipse Hono and Ditto acting as the central hub for bidirectional data exchange and management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "All building life cycle stages, including design, construction, operations, refurbishment, and adaptations, with the digital twin providing unified representation throughout."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness of the twin's representation of the physical asset."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for semantic modeling and standardized extension points for service integration, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems in the AECO domain."
]
